$comment: Analyst classes for the doc-intel deepagents layer. Each class becomes one programmatically generated SubAgent config. entry_types come from WellDrive S3 metadata (authoritative). This table is the single source of truth — portable, open JSON; no code may hard-code class routing.

classes.name: drilling_ops_analyst
classes.description: Drilling operations: day-by-day events, NPT, chronology, end-of-well summaries, BHA and bit performance.

classes.name: completions_analyst
classes.description: Completions and stimulation: frac design and execution, perforations, flowback, completion chronology.

classes.name: wellbore_geometry_analyst
classes.description: Trajectory and wellbore geometry: deviation surveys, directional plans, schematics, geosteering.

classes.name: fluids_analyst
classes.description: Drilling fluids and cementing: mud programs and recaps, cement programs and reports, solids control.

classes.name: reservoir_analyst
classes.description: Reservoir and fluid properties: PVT, well tests, core, mass spec, production and pressure-volume analyses.

classes.name: financial_analyst
classes.description: Well economics and land/regulatory paper: AFEs and supplements, field tickets, partner reports, regulatory filings.

classes.name: logs_analyst
classes.description: Wireline/LWD log products. Mostly image or vendor-binary formats that structured parsing cannot read — this analyst's job is to say precisely what exists and what is machine-readable, never to invent log values.
